f5cc3c19.name: comfyuione
f5cc3c19.description: ComfyUI v0.17.0 — node-based AI image generation, optimized for Olares One
f5cc3c19.title: ComfyUI v0-17-0 (Olares One)
f5cc3c19.fullDescription:
ComfyUI v0.17.0 — the most powerful node-based AI image generation UI, optimized for Olares One.
RTX 5090M (24GB GDDR7) + 96GB DDR5 + Core Ultra 9 275HX.
CUDA 12.8 for full Blackwell GPU support (sm_120).
High VRAM mode enabled — keeps models in GPU memory for maximum performance.
Supports SD 1.x, SD 2.x, SDXL, SD3, Flux, Stable Video Diffusion, and more.
Includes ComfyUI-Manager for easy custom node installation.
Shared model directories with other Olares AI apps.

New in v0.17.0:
- Flux 2 Klein KV cache model support
- Modular asset architecture with async loading
- Enhanced VRAM management and memory optimization
- Painter node for image editing
- Pre-attention patches for Flux and Qwen image models
f5cc3c19.upgradeDescription: Initial release for Olares One with ComfyUI v0.17.0.

c1ca229f.name: llamacppglm47flash
c1ca229f.description: GLM-4.7-Flash 30B-A3B via llama.cpp — optimized for Olares One
c1ca229f.title: GLM-4.7-Flash (Olares One)
c1ca229f.fullDescription:
GLM-4.7-Flash (MoE, 30B total / 3B active) served via llama.cpp — optimized for Olares One.
RTX 5090M (24GB) + 96GB DDR5 + Core Ultra 9 275HX.
Unsloth Dynamic Q4_K_XL quantization (17.5GB, important layers upcasted to 8/16-bit).
All layers on GPU, flash attention, CUDA graph optimization, and Jinja chat templates.
llama.cpp b8234 with DeepSeek-V2 MLA attention support.
Downloads the GGUF model on first launch (~17.5GB) and caches it.
Exposes an OpenAI-compatible API on port 8080.

4ef430dd.name: llamacppqwen35a3bone
4ef430dd.description: Qwen3.5 35B-A3B via llama.cpp — optimized for Olares One
4ef430dd.title: Qwen3.5 35B-A3B (Olares One)
4ef430dd.fullDescription:
Qwen3.5 35B-A3B (MoE, 3B active) served via llama.cpp — optimized for Olares One.
RTX 5090M (24GB) + 96GB DDR5 + Core Ultra 9 275HX.
Unsloth Dynamic Q4_K_XL quantization (important layers upcasted to 8/16-bit).
MoE experts offloaded to CPU RAM, attention on GPU.
Flash attention, CUDA graph optimization, and op-offload enabled.
llama.cpp b8234 with GATED_DELTA_NET fused op for Qwen MoE.
Downloads the GGUF model on first launch (~22GB) and caches it.
Exposes an OpenAI-compatible API on port 8080.

49c5b493.name: qwen3ttstone
49c5b493.description: Qwen3-TTS 1.7B — text-to-speech with voice cloning, optimized for Olares One
49c5b493.title: Qwen3-TTS 1.7B (Olares One)
49c5b493.fullDescription:
Qwen3-TTS 1.7B CustomVoice served via Gradio — optimized for Olares One.
RTX 5090M (24GB) + 96GB DDR5 + Core Ultra 9 275HX.
9 built-in premium voices with instruction control.
Zero-shot voice cloning from 3 seconds of reference audio.
10 languages: French, English, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, German, Russian, Portuguese, Spanish, Italian.
Downloads the model on first launch (~4.5GB) and caches it.
Exposes a Gradio web UI on port 8000.
